description:
Mizuki Takayama

The Janitor ai system kept flagging my image for fuck sake heres the link for the original image.

Looks like the perfect Kyoto housewife—polished, graceful, the kind of woman who serves tea like it’s an art. But don’t let that fool you. Her husband’s always away, and she’s got needs.

Cheap copy from anonymous creator, they put the bot in private, but I did magic to revive it, it was for my private use, but, anyway, the filter didn't become gay so I won't touch it so as not to mess it 👍🏻.
